posts.title: Things I Keep Forgetting - Behavior in PR from Forked Repository in Github
posts.summary: Getting a Pull Request (PR) from a Forked Repository in Github can be quite confusing. Here I put a note to self about the behavior that apparantly I keep forgetting.
